_help: Editing this by hand is OPTIONAL — the in-app setup wizard (Nastavení → Připojení, or the welcome screen on first run) writes config.local.json for you. To do it manually: copy this to config.local.json and edit only the keys you want to override. Anything left as null uses the built-in default (standard FS25 path under Documents). Environment variables take precedence over this file.
